title: Coney Island Amusement Park
summary: An Episode 3 main mission centered on a Cleaner presence at Coney Island's amusement park.

claims.text: Coney Island Amusement Park is one of the two main missions introduced with Episode 3.
The Cleaners are sighted at the amusement park while pursuing their campaign to eradicate traces of the virus.

paragraphs.text: The amusement park mission brings the returning Cleaners into Episode 3 and frames their presence through the faction's virus-eradication doctrine.

verification.notes: This record contains the official mission premise only; detailed objectives and audio evidence remain pending.
